data.title: Elon Musk-led X's Latest Lawsuit Forces Global Alliance For Responsible Media To Suspend Operations: Report
data.description: The Global Alliance for Responsible Media (GARM) has suspended its operations following an antitrust lawsuit filed by Elon Musk's X, with GARM and the World Federation of Advertisers planning to challenge the allegations in court.

data.title: Pepe Leads Rally, Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Advance As Memecoins Flash Green Amid Market Rebound
data.description: Memecoins were back in the green Thursday as the broader market recoiled after Monday's plunge.

data.title: Nvidia's H100 GPU Surpassed By China's New AI Chip That Operates Entirely On Light In Energy Efficiency
data.description: This chip, a significant upgrade from the earlier Taichi chip, operates entirely on light, eliminating the need for electronic computers. The team claims that this innovation has led to a substantial increase in efficiency and performance.

data.title: Jeremy Siegel Says Emergency Rate Cut No Longer Necessary, Urges Federal Reserve To Swiftly Lower Rates to 4% Amid Market Concerns: 'Powell Has Done Things Way Too Slow'
data.description: Jeremy Siegel, a prominent finance professor at the Wharton School, has backtracked on his earlier call for an emergency interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. However, he is still advocating for a rapid and aggressive rate reduction.

data.title: Peter Schiff Says Trump Family's 'Vague' Crypto Announcement Led To Bitcoin Rally, Gets Slammed By Critics: 'Make Serious Arguments'
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff linked Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) recovery rally to former President Donald Trump’s sons making a “vague” cryptocurrency announcement. He suggested his followers sell the apex cryptocurrency on this upward move.
